description_long: This object consists of two classic rifles placed side by side, each featuring a wooden fixed stock and foregrip, with a black metal receiver, barrel, and magazine. The rifles have a robust, utilitarian design, with visible iron sights mounted atop the barrel and receiver. The stocks are made of dark-stained wood, smoothly contoured for shoulder support, while the barrels are long and slender, extending well past the wooden foregrip. The detachable box magazines are positioned below the receiver, and the trigger guards are clearly defined. The overall finish is a combination of matte black metal and polished wood, giving the rifles a traditional yet functional appearance. No additional attachments or accessories are visible beyond the standard components.
description: A pair of classic rifles with wooden stocks, black metal barrels, and detachable box magazines, featuring iron sights and a traditional design.
description_view_0: Side view showing both rifles' full profiles, highlighting the wooden stocks, long barrels, and attached magazines.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying the parallel alignment of the rifles, the width of the stocks, and the magazines separated to the side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the other profile of the rifles, with clear visibility of the stocks, barrels, and magazines.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the stocks and barrels, with the magazines placed separately for clear visibility.
